sections.paragraph:
verb לטפול

to impute, ascribe; attach; smear, plaster

verb להיטפל

to stick, cling to

verb לטפל

to take care of; treat; address, deal with

verb טופל

be taken care of; be treated; be addressed, be dealt with

verb לטפל (>>טיפל)

to take care; help

adjective

of secondary importance, subordinate, additional, extrinsic, extrinsical, incidental, minor, nctive, ancillary
